findings.description: No E2E tests for K-P2 features: sidebar collapsible groups, notification bell dropdown, pod detail sheet, namespace grouping, stat card trends, settings tabs. Per skill rules, missing test coverage caps score at 8/10.
pipeline-state.json was flattened to single line losing readability; also removed qaVerdict/qaScore/e2eVerdict fields without clear reason — could break downstream consumers expecting those fields

Warning events card has trend=-3 hardcoded without trendPositiveIsGood — correct semantics (more warnings=bad=red for positive) but the implicit default should be documented or made explicit with trendPositiveIsGood={false}
NotificationsPanel uses inline style for dropdown background instead of CSS var — inconsistent with rest of codebase using var(--surface) or var(--elevated)
